description: Genotype-likelihood matrix; one row per variant site, one set of three columns per sample. Registered as input_values.tsv rows of value_kind=beagle.
label: BEAGLE genotype likelihoods

description: The site list a BEAGLE was computed over. Registered as site_sets.tsv rows.
intended_use: pairs with BEAGLE; defines the variant-site axis
label: Sites file (chrom, pos, ref, alt)

description: Ordered list of sample_ids; the WHO axis. Registered as sample_sets.tsv rows.
intended_use: identifies which samples each layer is computed on
label: Sample set (catflist)

description: Per-sample labels (family, population, batch, karyotype). Registered as group_sets.tsv rows.
intended_use: row partitioning for FST / dxy / popstats
label: Group / metadata table

description: Genomic intervals (chrom, start, end). Registered as interval_sets.tsv rows.
label: Interval / coordinate scope

description: Per-pair relatedness coefficients (theta, IBS0/1/2, KING) over a sample_set × interval × site_set scope. Emitted by analysis_id=ngsrelate.
intended_use: kinship QC, family detection, pedigree input
label: ngsRelate pairwise relatedness

description: Reconstructed trios / family graph from a relatedness_res. Emitted by analysis_id=ngspedigree.
label: ngsPedigree pedigree

description: Per-trio Mendelian-error rate over an interval. Emitted by analysis_id=mendelian.
intended_use: trio QC, sites filtering, sequencing-error model
label: Mendelian-error rate per trio

description: Window-wise composite popstats result; downstream readers split into per-metric layers. Emitted by analysis_id=popstats.
intended_use: manuscript path B: FST scans, divergence, diversity
label: Composite popstats (FST / dxy / piN / piS)

description: Single-metric FST slice. Emitted by analysis_id=fst_pairwise.
label: Pairwise FST in windows

description: Single-metric π slice. Emitted by analysis_id=theta_pi.
label: Nucleotide diversity θπ in windows

description: Single-metric dxy slice. Emitted by analysis_id=dxy.
label: Between-group divergence dxy in windows

description: Per-sample arrangement-call sheet (sample_id, candidate_id, karyotype ∈ {0,1,2}). Manually curated or produced by an arrangement-calling module not yet registered here.
intended_use: defines karyotype groups for popstats / mendelian per_candidate
label: Per-sample karyotype assignment

description: List of candidate inversion intervals (candidate_id, chrom, start, end). Produced by an inversion-calling module not yet registered here; today read from inversion-atlas exports.
intended_use: the candidate axis for path A and path B
label: Candidate inversion intervals

description: Window-wise haplotype-regime annotation along a candidate scope. Produced by a haplotype-regime detector not yet registered.
intended_use: fast inversion review path; lets the candidate review render without the full Mendelian chain
label: Long-range haplotype regime

description: Cluster of samples with high pairwise relatedness; the unit Mendelian validation runs on. Derived from relatedness_res.
intended_use: required for the deeper Mendelian path; not yet wired
label: Family hub (high-relatedness cluster)

description: Per-(candidate_a, candidate_b, karyo_a, karyo_b) joint karyotype distortion vs expectation. Produced by inversion_pair_incompatibility.
label: Genotype-distortion summary

description: One row per promoted candidate. Produced by iv_candidate_promoter.
intended_use: the candidate axis once auto-promoted from raw signals; supersedes manual inversion_candidates.tsv when stable
label: Candidate inversion registry (promoted)

description: Per-candidate trail of contributing signals. Produced by iv_candidate_promoter.
label: Candidate chain evidence

description: Per (sample, candidate) 0/1/2 calls without orientation. Produced by karyotype_auto_caller.
label: Unpolarized karyotype calls

description: Per (sample, candidate) 0/1/2 with orientation. Output of karyotype_polarizer; canonical karyotype layer for downstream.
intended_use: feeds mendelian / popstats / page 6 karyotype_panel when stabilised
label: Polarized karyotype calls

description: Per-window band scores. External input from upstream signal-calling.
label: Window band calls (raw signal)

description: Per-site L3 statistic hits. External input.
label: L3 contingency hits (raw signal)

description: Per-bin dosage summary statistics. External input.
label: Dosage summary (raw signal)

description: Pointer to the reference / ancestral comparison used by karyotype_polarizer.
label: Reference genome (assembly + ancestral context)
Interchromosomal Effects Layer
description: Test whether focal inversion heterozygosity affects CO / DCO / coefficient-of-coincidence on other chromosomes. Grain: focal_inv x tested_chr.

label: Coefficient of coincidence (C) matrix
description: C = observed DCO / expected DCO per interval pair. Required for interchromosomal effect tests.

label: Local inversion covariates on tested chromosomes
description: Registered local inversions on the tested chromosomes; used as covariates so interchromosomal effect estimates aren't confounded by local inversions.

label: Family-aware permutation design
description: Permutation scheme that respects family structure so significance tests aren't fooled by sib-correlated meioses.
intended_use: null model for interchromosomal effect tests

label: CO rate matrix (focal_inv x tested_chr)
description: Crossover rate matrix produced by the interchromosomal effects layer.

label: DCO rate matrix (focal_inv x tested_chr)
description: Double-crossover rate matrix produced by the interchromosomal effects layer.
